# 🆕 NEW MOD SUBMISSION

<!-- Use this section when submitting a new mod -->

## Mod Information

**Mod Name**: 
**Mod ID (folder name)**: 
**Description**: 

## Required Files

- [ ] `entry.lua` - Main mod entry point
- [ ] `metadata.yaml` - Mod metadata
- [ ] `README.md` - User documentation

## Metadata Validation

- [ ] Contains all required fields (Name, Description, Author, Version, Creation Date, Last Updated, Development Status, Game Version Supported, ID)
- [ ] Valid YAML syntax
- [ ] Follows [mod-metadata-schema.yaml](https://github.com/CJFWeatherhead/TNI-Mods/blob/main/mod-metadata-schema.yaml)
- [ ] Parameters properly defined (if configurable)

- [ ] Tested with ModManager
- [ ] Tested without other mods
